title: A tiny test runner
prompt_md:
A test runner takes a list of cases and reports how many passed and failed.

Write `run_cases(cases)` where `cases` is a list of dicts, each shaped like `{"got": <value>, "want": <value>}`. A case **passes** when `got == want`.

Return a dict: `{"passed": <int>, "failed": <int>}`.
hints: Start two counters at 0 and loop over the cases.
For each case compare `case["got"] == case["want"]`; increment passed or failed accordingly.
